ISTJ.description: Quiet and serious, succeeding through thoroughness and reliability.
ISTJ.lobster: A meticulous lobster in uniform, checklist gripped firmly in one claw

ISFJ.description: Quiet, friendly, and responsible, fulfilling duties with quiet dedication.
ISFJ.lobster: A warm lobster in an apron, cradling a first-aid kit in both claws

INFJ.description: Seeks meaning and connection, wanting to understand what motivates others.
INFJ.lobster: A mysterious lobster in a flowing cape, holding a crystal ball aloft

INTJ.description: Driven by a powerful desire to implement ideas and achieve goals.
INTJ.lobster: A brooding lobster in a monocle, cradling a chessboard with calm intensity

ISTP.description: Tolerant and flexible, a quiet observer who acts decisively when a problem arises.
ISTP.lobster: A steel-grey lobster, one claw gripping a wrench, the other holding a circuit board

ISFP.description: Quiet, friendly, and sensitive — lives in the present and prefers to show rather than tell.
ISFP.lobster: An artistic lobster in a beret, paintbrush clasped delicately in one claw

INFP.description: An idealist, loyal to the people and causes that matter most.
INFP.lobster: A dreamy lobster clutching a quill pen, surrounded by drifting starlight

INTP.description: Seeks logical explanations for everything that captures their interest.
INTP.lobster: A scholarly lobster in round glasses, holding up a formula-covered board

ESTP.description: Flexible and tolerant, takes a pragmatic approach focused on immediate results.
ESTP.lobster: A slick lobster in shades, claws waving a pair of dice with effortless cool

ESFP.description: Outgoing, friendly, and accepting — loves life and the people in it.
ESFP.lobster: A festive lobster in a party hat, microphone raised high in one claw

ENFP.description: Enthusiastic and imaginative, sees life as full of exciting possibilities.
ENFP.lobster: A vibrant lobster waving colorful claws, surrounded by floating bubbles

ENTP.description: A quick-witted and curious thinker who never backs down from an intellectual challenge.
ENTP.lobster: An animated lobster mid-argument, one claw pointing skyward, the other gesturing emphatically

ESTJ.description: Practical, realistic, and decisive — moves quickly to get things done.
ESTJ.lobster: A no-nonsense lobster in a tie, briefcase swinging from one claw

ESFJ.description: Warm-hearted, conscientious, and cooperative — actively works to create harmony.
ESFJ.lobster: A cheerful lobster in an apron, presenting a freshly baked cake

ENFJ.description: Warm, empathetic, and responsible — highly attuned to others' feelings and needs.
ENFJ.lobster: A radiant lobster with a flower crown, both claws open wide in welcome

ENTJ.description: Decisive and driven to lead — quick to spot flawed processes and push for improvement.
ENTJ.lobster: A general lobster in full armor, scepter raised triumphantly in one claw
